english: Wash your hands now.

translations.en: Wash your hands now.
translations.ja: 今すぐ手を洗って。

english: Please open the door.

translations.en: Please open the door.
translations.ja: ドアを開けてください。

english: Where is the city bus?

translations.en: Where is the city bus?
translations.ja: 市バスはどこですか？

english: Can you help me?

translations.en: Can you help me?
translations.ja: 手伝ってくれますか？

english: Look at that tall tree.

translations.en: Look at that tall tree.
translations.ja: あの高い木を見て。

english: It is very cold here.

translations.en: It is very cold here.
translations.ja: ここはとても寒いです。

english: Where is the room key?

translations.en: Where is the room key?
translations.ja: 部屋の鍵はどこですか？

english: Show me the map please.

translations.en: Show me the map please.
translations.ja: 地図を見せてください。

english: Put it on the desk.

translations.en: Put it on the desk.
translations.ja: それを机の上に置いて。

english: Please call a doctor now.

translations.en: Please call a doctor now.
translations.ja: 今すぐ医者を呼んでください。

english: I am very hungry now.

translations.en: I am very hungry now.
translations.ja: 今、とてもお腹が空いています。

english: Wait for me over there.

translations.en: Wait for me over there.
translations.ja: あそこで待っていて。

english: Can I have some water?

translations.en: Can I have some water?
translations.ja: お水を少しいただけますか？

english: Look at the blue sky.

translations.en: Look at the blue sky.
translations.ja: 青い空を見て。

english: Open the small window please.

translations.en: Open the small window please.
translations.ja: 小さな窓を開けてください。

english: Where is my house now?

translations.en: Where is my house now?
translations.ja: 私の家は今どこですか？

english: Stop the car right now.

translations.en: Stop the car right now.
translations.ja: 今すぐ車を止めて。

english: Sit down on the chair.

translations.en: Sit down on the chair.
translations.ja: 椅子に座って。

english: Look at the big moon.

translations.en: Look at the big moon.
translations.ja: 大きな月を見て。

english: Please open the heavy front door.

translations.en: Please open the heavy front door.
translations.ja: 重い玄関のドアを開けてください。

english: I like to play the drum.

translations.en: I like to play the drum.
translations.ja: 私はドラムを叩くのが好きです。

english: Can you hear my voice now?

translations.en: Can you hear my voice now?
translations.ja: 私の声が今聞こえますか？

english: It is a very nice idea.

translations.en: It is a very nice idea.
translations.ja: それはとても良い考えです。

english: I want to see the movie.

translations.en: I want to see the movie.
translations.ja: その映画を見たいです。

english: Tell me about your school today.

translations.en: Tell me about your school today.
translations.ja: 今日のあなたの学校について教えて。

english: Do you like this yellow flower?

translations.en: Do you like this yellow flower?
translations.ja: この黄色い花は好きですか？

english: I am sorry for being late.

translations.en: I am sorry for being late.
translations.ja: 遅れてすみません。

english: Let us play in the park.

translations.en: Let us play in the park.
translations.ja: 公園で遊びましょう。

english: Can you help me move this?

translations.en: Can you help me move this?
translations.ja: これを動かすのを手伝ってくれますか？

english: I want to read a story.

translations.en: I want to read a story.
translations.ja: 物語を読みたいです。

english: I am happy to meet you.

translations.en: I am happy to meet you.
translations.ja: お会いできて嬉しいです。

english: Please speak a little bit louder.

translations.en: Please speak a little bit louder.
translations.ja: もう少し大きな声で話してください。

english: I like your new black shoes.

translations.en: I like your new black shoes.
translations.ja: あなたの新しい黒い靴が気に入りました。

english: How do you feel this morning?

translations.en: How do you feel this morning?
translations.ja: 今朝の気分はどうですか？

english: I want to go outside now.

translations.en: I want to go outside now.
translations.ja: 今、外に行きたいです。

english: What are you doing here today?

translations.en: What are you doing here today?
translations.ja: 今日はここで何をしているの？

english: I like to sing a song.

translations.en: I like to sing a song.
translations.ja: 私は歌を歌うのが好きです。

english: Is this your blue school bag?

translations.en: Is this your blue school bag?
translations.ja: これはあなたの青いスクールバッグ？

english: See you at the train station.

translations.en: See you at the train station.
translations.ja: 鉄道の駅で会いましょう。

english: I prefer tea to hot coffee.

translations.en: I prefer tea to hot coffee.
translations.ja: 熱いコーヒーよりお茶の方が好きです。

english: My father works at the office in city.

translations.en: My father works at the office in city.
translations.ja: 父は街のオフィスで働いています。

english: We visit the local library once a week.

translations.en: We visit the local library once a week.
translations.ja: 私たちは週に一度、地元の図書館を訪れます。

english: The store is near the bank on corner.

translations.en: The store is near the bank on corner.
translations.ja: その店は角の銀行の近くにあります。

english: She is a great music teacher in school.

translations.en: She is a great music teacher in school.
translations.ja: 彼女は学校の素晴らしい音楽の先生です。

english: They live in a big house near forest.

translations.en: They live in a big house near forest.
translations.ja: 彼らは森の近くの大きな家に住んでいます。

english: The science museum is very quiet on Sunday morning.

translations.en: The science museum is very quiet on Sunday morning.
translations.ja: 日曜日の朝、科学博物館はとても静かです。

english: We have a party on the last day.

translations.en: We have a party on the last day.
translations.ja: 私たちは最終日にパーティーを開きます。

english: He drives a white truck for a company.

translations.en: He drives a white truck for a company.
translations.ja: 彼は会社のために白いトラックを運転しています。

english: I go to the post office every Monday.

translations.en: I go to the post office every Monday.
translations.ja: 毎週月曜日に郵便局へ行きます。

english: The hospital is over there near the gate.

translations.en: The hospital is over there near the gate.
translations.ja: 病院はあそこの門の近くにあります。

english: Many people visit the park in the spring.

translations.en: Many people visit the park in the spring.
translations.ja: 春には多くの人がその公園を訪れます。

english: I study at the local school with friends.

translations.en: I study at the local school with friends.
translations.ja: 地元の学校で友達と勉強しています。

english: She helps the old lady with the bags.

translations.en: She helps the old lady with the bags.
translations.ja: 彼女はお年寄りの荷物を持つのを助けます。

english: We follow the school rules to be good.

translations.en: We follow the school rules to be good.
translations.ja: 私たちは良い子であるために校則を守ります。

english: He is a famous baseball player in town.

translations.en: He is a famous baseball player in town.
translations.ja: 彼は町で有名な野球選手です。

english: The city has a big stadium for games.

translations.en: The city has a big stadium for games.
translations.ja: その都市には試合用の大きなスタジアムがあります。

english: They work together every day in the hall.

translations.en: They work together every day in the hall.
translations.ja: 彼らは毎日、会館で一緒に働いています。

english: The police station is far from the center.

translations.en: The police station is far from the center.
translations.ja: 警察署は中心部から遠いです。

english: We save water at home for our nature.

translations.en: We save water at home for our nature.
translations.ja: 自然のために家で節水しています。

english: We share the same room in our house.

translations.en: We share the same room in our house.
translations.ja: 私たちは家で同じ部屋を共有しています。

english: Think about the right answer before you write the report.

translations.en: Think about the right answer before you write the report.
translations.ja: レポートを書く前に正しい答えについて考えてください。

english: This is a very simple plan to solve the problem.

translations.en: This is a very simple plan to solve the problem.
translations.ja: これはその問題を解決するための非常に単純な計画です。

english: I want to know the reason for the change now.

translations.en: I want to know the reason for the change now.
translations.ja: 今、変更の理由を知りたいです。

english: We need to find the truth about the old story.

translations.en: We need to find the truth about the old story.
translations.ja: 私たちはその古い物語についての真実を見つける必要があります。

english: Every problem has a solution if we think very carefully.

translations.en: Every problem has a solution if we think very carefully.
translations.ja: 非常によく考えれば、どんな問題にも解決策はあります。

english: Follow the logical steps here to find the best way.

translations.en: Follow the logical steps here to find the best way.
translations.ja: 最良の方法を見つけるために、ここにある論理的なステップに従ってください。

english: The result of the final test was clear for everyone.

translations.en: The result of the final test was clear for everyone.
translations.ja: 最終テストの結果は誰の目にも明らかでした。

english: We must learn from history to build a better society.

translations.en: We must learn from history to build a better society.
translations.ja: より良い社会を築くために、私たちは歴史から学ばなければなりません。

english: Change is good for us because it brings new things.

translations.en: Change is good for us because it brings new things.
translations.ja: 変化は新しいものをもたらすので、私たちにとって良いことです。

english: I understand the main point of your speech for class.

translations.en: I understand the main point of your speech for class.
translations.ja: クラスでのスピーチの要点は理解しました。

english: Consider the safety first when you play with the machine.

translations.en: Consider the safety first when you play with the machine.
translations.ja: その機械で遊ぶ時は、まず安全を考慮してください。

english: Life is full of surprises if you keep a positive mind.

translations.en: Life is full of surprises if you keep a positive mind.
translations.ja: 前向きな心を持ち続ければ、人生は驚きに満ちています。

english: We should work together now to protect the natural world.

translations.en: We should work together now to protect the natural world.
translations.ja: 自然界を守るために、私たちは今協力すべきです。

english: The fact is very important for the study of science.

translations.en: The fact is very important for the study of science.
translations.ja: その事実は科学の研究にとって非常に重要です。

english: I like your creative way to finish the art project.

translations.en: I like your creative way to finish the art project.
translations.ja: アートプロジェクトを完成させるためのあなたの創造的なやり方が好きです。

english: Let us analyze the game to find our weak points.

translations.en: Let us analyze the game to find our weak points.
translations.ja: 自分たちの弱点を見つけるために、その試合を分析しましょう。

english: This is a special discovery for the students in school.

translations.en: This is a special discovery for the students in school.
translations.ja: これは学校の生徒たちにとって特別な発見です。

english: Focus on the target now to achieve the best results.

translations.en: Focus on the target now to achieve the best results.
translations.ja: 最高の結果を得るために、今は目標に集中してください。

english: It is a natural reaction when you see a movie.

translations.en: It is a natural reaction when you see a movie.
translations.ja: 映画を見る時のそれは自然な反応です。

english: Knowledge is our best tool to change the future now.

translations.en: Knowledge is our best tool to change the future now.
translations.ja: 知識は今、未来を変えるための最良の道具です。

english: I have two small brothers.

translations.en: I have two small brothers.
translations.ja: 私には2人の小さな弟がいます。

english: Do you study math daily?

translations.en: Do you study math daily?
translations.ja: 毎日数学を勉強していますか？

english: She does not like carrots.

translations.en: She does not like carrots.
translations.ja: 彼女は人参が好きではありません。

english: We are students in Japan.

translations.en: We are students in Japan.
translations.ja: 私たちは日本の学生です。

english: He can play the piano well.

translations.en: He can play the piano well.
translations.ja: 彼は上手にピアノを弾くことができます。

english: Is this a bird or a plane?

translations.en: Is this a bird or a plane?
translations.ja: これは鳥ですか、それとも飛行機ですか？

english: I went to the park yesterday.

translations.en: I went to the park yesterday.
translations.ja: 昨日公園に行きました。

english: My mother is in the kitchen now.

translations.en: My mother is in the kitchen now.
translations.ja: 母は今、台所にいます。

english: Do you have any sisters?

translations.en: Do you have any sisters?
translations.ja: 姉妹はいますか？

english: He swims in the pool often.

translations.en: He swims in the pool often.
translations.ja: 彼はよくプールで泳ぎます。

english: I want to be a pilot soon.

translations.en: I want to be a pilot soon.
translations.ja: 私はもうすぐパイロットになりたいです。

english: She has a red umbrella.

translations.en: She has a red umbrella.
translations.ja: 彼女は赤い傘を持っています。

english: This book is very old now.

translations.en: This book is very old now.
translations.ja: この本は今ではとても古いです。

english: I am reading a new book.

translations.en: I am reading a new book.
translations.ja: 私は新しい本を読んでいます。

english: Does your father work here?

translations.en: Does your father work here?
translations.ja: あなたのお父さんはここで働いていますか？

english: They like to eat apples.

translations.en: They like to eat apples.
translations.ja: 彼らはリンゴを食べるのが好きです。

english: There is a cat on the mat.

translations.en: There is a cat on the mat.
translations.ja: マットの上に猫がいます。

english: I help my mother every day.

translations.en: I help my mother every day.
translations.ja: 私は毎日母を助けます。

english: She can speak English well.

translations.en: She can speak English well.
translations.ja: 彼女は上手に英語を話すことができます。

english: I like this green shirt.

translations.en: I like this green shirt.
translations.ja: 私はこの緑のシャツが好きです。
